inputs.label: Number of Hives
inputs.businessContext: Total number of active beehives in the apiary.

inputs.label: Frames per Hive
inputs.businessContext: Number of frames per hive, typically 10 for Langstroth.

inputs.label: Honey per Frame
inputs.businessContext: Average honey yield per fully capped frame.

inputs.label: Extraction Loss
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of honey lost during extraction and filtering.

inputs.label: Price per kg
inputs.businessContext: Selling price per kilogram of honey.

inputs.label: Cost per Hive
inputs.businessContext: Annual operational cost per hive (feed, maintenance, etc.).
